channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Carpets rollls dunoed on Seal Street E8, 12th April
item.description:
Hello, please remove the dumped carpets from Seal Street E8 (Shacklewell Lane end). Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shacklewell Lane, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish and waste on pavement, 12th April
item.description:
Rubbish and waste on pavement / road. Bin overflowing. This happens repeatedly. Do something about the bin please. Either empty it more often, make it more secure.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 119D, Brook Drive, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping Mehetabel Rd, 12th April
item.description:
This location is getting targeted by fly tippers

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mehetabel Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Second fly tipping to go with the burnt out vehicle, 12th April
item.description:
There is a new load of fly tipping dumped on the carriageway - it includes a washing machine and other commercial waste. Currently we have two lots of fly tipping (three if you count the broken glass on the carriageway near the bridge beyond the lake, a burnt out minibus, an abandoned Lime bike on on the approach to the lake) and lots of other detritus. This is awful for local residents, but also visitors to Crossness Pumping Station are getting a terrible impression of the area.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bazalgette Way, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light still on despite previous reports, 12th April
item.description:
This single street light at the pedestrian crossing continuous to be on 24/7 despite previous report.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, Sayer Street, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Remnants and discarded items, 12th April
item.description:
These flytipped/disgarded items require removal.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Greet Street, Waterloo, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light on 24/7, 12th April
item.description:
This street light has been on 24/7 for over a year now.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Waleorde Road, Walworth, Greater London

item.title: Flytipping on ventral road. Has been here at least since yesterday morning, 12th April
item.description:
Fridge chair and carpet roll

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington Common, London

item.title: 2 street lights on 24/7, 12th April
item.description:
2 street lights are on 24/7 on Walworth Rd near Larcom st.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Larcom Street, Walworth, Greater London

item.title: Overgrown hedge, 12th April
item.description:
Hedge off 109 is overgrown blocking the narrow pavement by a tree, preventing pushchairs, prams etc to go through
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wells Way, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip at the end of Eastney street, 12th April
item.description:
There has been a fly tip at the end of Eastney Street, please could this be cleared?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Old Woolwich Road, Greenwich

item.title: Graffiti tags at the end of Eastney street, 12th April
item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eastney Street, Greenwich

item.title: Outside number 56 Chichester road, 12th April

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chichester Road, London

item.title: Fly tipping, 12th April
item.description:
I reported this and received an update to say it had been removed but it hasn’t so am sending again

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Redcar Street, Camberwell, Greater London

item.title: Solidified leaves and rubbish, 12th April
item.description:
Wells Way pavement (West) from Parkhouse street up to burgess park is covered in rubbish and leaves for months

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wells Way, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The usual, 12th April

The usual

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mackenzie Road, Penge, Greater London

item.title: The Green, 12th April
item.description:
People keep throwing dog poo bags in private property along the green. Please can dog waste bins be placed on the green and the 2 smaller green patches either end of the green.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 29, The Green, Upper Belvedere, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Church Street, Enfield

item.category: Inoffensive up to 2 metres off the ground
